_doc: Bridges Meta/Google dashboard names to canonical slugs that match Stripe's utm_campaign values, AND collapses legacy Stripe slugs (multiple slugs that refer to the same paid campaign) into one canonical key. Going forward, set every new campaign's destination URL utm_campaign= to a canonical slug AND add a row here. Convention: <source>-<intent>-<yyyymm>.

_known_non_paid_slugs.recovery: Abandoned-cart recovery email click. Not a paid platform; leave as-is.
_known_non_paid_slugs.profile_link: Instagram bio link / organic. Not a paid platform; leave as-is.
